commands: vp migrate --no-interactive # existing Vite+ project: upgrade the toolchain version only, skip the full setup
cat package.json # vite-plus version upgrade is applied
cat pnpm-workspace.yaml # pnpm settings consolidated by the version upgrade
test -f .nvmrc && echo nvmrc-kept # .nvmrc is left untouched without --full
test ! -f .node-version && echo no-node-version # no .node-version is written
cat tsconfig.json # tsconfig baseUrl is left untouched without --full
